name: Altan Rio Minerals Limited
summary: Altan Rio Minerals Limited, a mineral exploration company, acquires, explores, evaluates, and develops mineral assets in Mongolia and Australia. The company explores for gold and copper deposits. It holds interest in the Chandman project covering an area of 1,273 acres located in western Mongolia; and Southern Cross project that covers 22 kilometers of gold mineralizing structure in Western Australia. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
